name: intent-mail
description: Self-hosted email triage for Claude Code over Gmail and Outlook. Daily check-in digest (P1–P4 priority + why + needs-response), long-thread summaries, group-by-category, and real actions (read/archive/delete/draft/flag/move) through Gmail and Microsoft Graph — you hold the OAuth token, no third party sees your mailbox.

intentmail.name: intentmail
intentmail.description: Self-hosted IntentMail MCP server: Gmail + Outlook OAuth, delta sync, AI triage/summarize/rules, daily-digest, and write actions. Runs locally over stdio; the mailbox never leaves your machine.
